name: diagCheckValidPrimitive
title: diagCheckValidPrimitive
description: Returns 1 if the response received for the request matches its specification in the diagnostic description. If a primitive qualifier is given, the definition of that primitive at the object's service is used as specification.
If the primitive is not valid, 0 is returned and the optional parameter reasonOut[0] is set to the precise reason why the check failed (see below).
If a primitive is specified, it must be defined for the service the response currently refers to! Please refer to diagnostic descriptions with overloaded responses for details.
return: 1: Primitive matches the specification in the diagnostic description.
